Class PermissionRecordService

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.security.PermissionRecordService
@Service @Transactional public class PermissionRecordService extends Object
CRUD service for standalone PermissionRecords (the C/R/U/D + target definition of a single permission). Permissions owned by a Role are managed through RoleService; this service handles records directly, e.g. for the personal permissions of a user or the admin permission editor.

Like UserService, this is an admin-console service and therefore carries no per-call authorization parameters — access is gated by the admin login in front of the UI.

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<PermissionRecord> getPermissionsByType(String absoluteObjectType)

    • createPermission

      public PermissionRecord createPermission(PermissionRecord permission, Long departmentId)
      Persists a new permission record. If departmentId is non-null the record is scoped to that department; null leaves it unscoped (a global permission definition).

    • updatePermission

      public PermissionRecord updatePermission(Long id, PermissionRecord details, Long departmentId)
      Updates the C/R/U/D flags and the target of an existing record. The objectName is kept in sync automatically by the entity's @PreUpdate hook.

    • deletePermission

      public void deletePermission(Long id)
